text: In the first image, I feel anticipation in the sterile quiet; the glass wall divides, inviting speculation about what ideas may be incubated beyond. The second image immerses me in a space of innovation and curiosity. Surrounded by bold colors and concepts of research and development, I am reminded of the blurry boundary between clarity and confusion—how easily our vision, both literal and metaphorical, can be obscured. I feel urged to reflect on perception itself, and the meaning we construct from the unknown.
